name: fairyteller_intake
description: Accepts fairyteller.ru/create orders, persists them in the Fairyteller Job API, starts the text pipeline asynchronously, and returns a fast 202 response.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, status: "received", jobId: $("Attach Job API Result").item.json.jobId, statusUrl: "https://fairyteller.ru/api/fairyteller/jobs/" + $("Attach Job API Result").item.json.jobId, message: "Book job accepted" } }}

note: Sanitized export for version control. Secrets are referenced through n8n environment variables only.
